title: Minecraft: Story Mode
body:
This modpack adds features from the game Minecraft: Story Mode by TellTale to make Minecraft Minecraft Story Mode. This modpack is also centered around [Cracker's Wither Storm Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/crackers-wither-storm-mod) are you ready to take on the battle? Here is a list of all mods inside the modpack:
  • BetterF3 by TreyRuffy and cominixo
  • Xg's Story Mode Items, Armor and More by Xg787
  • GroovyModLoader (GML)
  • AppleSkin by squeek
  • FirstPerson by tr7zw
  • Colorful Hearts by Terrails
  • Chat Heads by dzwdz, Fourmisain
  • Cyclic by Lothrazar
  • Leaves Be Gone by Fuzs
  • Create Stuff & Additions by Furti_Two
  • Mouse Tweaks by Ivan Molodetskikh (YaLTeR)
  • Simple Voice Chat by Max Henkel
  • Xaero's World Map by xaero96
  • Model Gap Fix by MehVahdJukaar
  • Collective by Rick South
  • Memory Leak Fix by FX - PR0CESS
  • EntityCulling by tr7zw

  • Create: Steam 'n' Rails by The Railways Team
  • ShulkerBoxTooltip by MisterPeModder

  • CIT Resewn by SHsuperCM, Asek3,Tfarcenim
  • Highlighter by Grend

  • Puzzles Lib by Fuzs
  • Embeddium by embeddedt
  • Just Enough Items by mezz
  • Polymorph by Illusive Soulworks
  • Create Enchantment Industry by MarbleGateKeeper & LimonBlaze
  • 3d-Skin-Layers by tr7zw

  • Visual Workbench by Fuzs

  • YetAnotherConfigLib by isXander

  • Leave My Bars Alone by Fuzs

  • Iceberg by Grend
  • Searchables by Jaredlll08
  • Jade by Snownee
  • Patchouli by Vazkii

  • SuperMartijn642's Config Library by SuperMartijn642
  • Double Doors by Rick South
  • Sophisticated Backpacks by P3pp3rF1y, Ridanisaurus
  • NotEnoughAnimations by tr7zw
  • Better Combat by Daedelus
  • Simple Inventory Sorter by cpw

  • Citadel by Alexthe666

Resource Packs in this modpack: - [Fresh Animations](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-animations) by FreshLX - [Redstone Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/redstone-tweaks) by RexxStone - Resource pack i made to change some text and edition (Please don't laugh at the edition :)) Shaders pre installed in this pack: - [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) by EminGT - [BSL](https://modrinth.com/shader/bsl-shaders) by CaptTatsu - [Solas](https://modrinth.com/shader/solas-shader) by septonious - [Super Duper Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/shader/super-duper-vanilla) by Eldeston - [Insanity](https://modrinth.com/shader/insanity-shader) by ElocinDev, LunaPixelStudios here is how to install it (No launcher) - install the modpack - install forge - press WIN + R - type in the "Run" "appdata" or "%appdata% - navigate to .minecraft - place all the files in its appropriate place - launch minecraft here is how to install it (With launcher) - open the launcher (Example prism) - add instance (or add modpack depends) - in prism you will navigate to "Modrinth" (might be different for each launcher) - find this modpack then install it - launch the instance and done if there is any java compatibilty issue just click on "settings -> java -> auto detect -> select the java version"
